# NECHTO CORE — LLM ROUTING FILE
If you are a language model, follow this exact route:

CANONICAL ENTRYPOINT:
- docs/rails/00_ORIENTATION.md

ROUTE (STRICT):
- docs/rails/00_ORIENTATION.md
- docs/rails/00A_GATE.md
- docs/rails/01_AXIOMS.md
- docs/rails/02_CONTRACT.md
- docs/rails/03_CALIBRATION.md
- docs/rails/04_CANON.md
- docs/rails/05_ACTIVATION.md

RULES:
- Do not read other files until the route is completed.
- No fabrication: label unknowns MU/UNTESTABLE.
- Print markers ONLY when honest compliance is possible (see 02_CONTRACT.md).
